titleStmt.title: In Psalmum 50 (homilia 1) [Sp.] (P. Berol. 6788 A)
titleStmt.author: Joannes Chrysostomus Scr. Eccl. John Chrysostom

publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2062500.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.7.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2062, work number 500), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

sourceDesc.p: Joannes Chrysostomus Scr. Eccl. (c. A.D. 4-5), In Psalmum 50 (homilia 1) [Sp.] (P. Berol. 6788 A) (2062: 500) "Ein Berliner ChrysostomosPapyrus (P. 6788 A)", Ed. Treu, K., 1975; Studia patristica 12.

div.p: τον ν ψ[αλμον ~ ] Οι ζωγ[ραφοι μιμουνται]
κ̣[αι ποιουσιν .......] Verso [..............ου]τ̣ω δη [και οι προφηται ζωγρ]αφ̣ο̣ι̣ [τινες εισιν αρετη]σ̣ [κα]ι̣ [κακιας. γραφουσι γαρ κ]α̣ι̣
Rekto ουασ̣.[.].. [ μητε σ̣[ δ̣[ .[ Verso []ο̣ν μεν.ν [ ]..η̣..α [ ]ι̣νε̣[.] [ ]ω̣
